description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a classic design, featuring a black canvas upper and prominent white stitching along the seams and edges. The shoe has a white rubber toe cap and a thick white rubber sole with a thin black stripe running around its perimeter. Metal eyelets reinforce the lace holes, and the shoe is laced with white shoelaces in a standard criss-cross pattern. The ankle area is padded and the interior lining appears to be a light beige fabric. On the heel, the 'ALL★STAR' branding is visible, indicating a Converse Chuck Taylor style.
description: A black high-top sneaker with white laces, white rubber toe cap, and 'ALL★STAR' branding on the heel. The shoe features prominent white stitching and a classic urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white rubber toe cap, criss-cross lacing, and symmetrical stitching.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black canvas upper, white stitching, metal eyelets, and the white rubber sole with a black stripe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical stitching, heel tab, and 'ALL★STAR' branding on the heel of the sole.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the canvas upper, stitching, and sole details.
attribute_logo: ALL★STAR logo on the heel in black text on a white background
